recent_amendments.title: Amendment to Section 80C - Enhanced Deduction Limit
recent_amendments.summary: Enhanced limit for life insurance premium and tuition fee under Section 80C from ₹1.5 lakhs to ₹2 lakhs
recent_amendments.old_provision: Maximum deduction under Section 80C: ₹1,50,000 per annum
recent_amendments.new_provision: Maximum deduction under Section 80C: ₹2,00,000 per annum
recent_amendments.impact_analysis: Taxpayers can now save up to ₹60,000 additional per annum. Beneficial for those with high insurance premiums and education expenses.
recent_amendments.transitional_provisions: Applies to FY 2024-25 onwards. No backdating of benefits.

recent_amendments.title: Clarification on Input Tax Credit eligibility for Business Meals
recent_amendments.summary: GSTN issued circular on ITC eligibility for business meal expenses
recent_amendments.old_position: Ambiguity on ITC eligibility for business meal expenses
recent_amendments.new_position: ITC available if meal is integral part of business operations (e.g., client entertainment)
recent_amendments.impact_analysis: Provides clarity and allows ITC reclaim for qualifying business meals. Estimated benefit ₹5,000-50,000 depending on business type.

recent_amendments.title: Enhanced KYC/AML Requirements for NBFC Operations
recent_amendments.summary: RBI strengthened KYC and AML procedures for NBFC lending
recent_amendments.new_provision: Enhanced KYC including beneficial ownership verification and source of funds details
requirements: Beneficial ownership declaration for all entities
Source of funds verification for transactions >₹10 lakhs
Annual KYC renewal for high-risk customers
Enhanced monitoring for PEP (Politically Exposed Persons)
recent_amendments.penalty: Fine up to ₹5 lakhs for non-compliance
